title: BlockacyKain_KD
description: Based upon the Legacy of Kain franchise, bringing Soul Reaver and Blood Omen to Minecraft.
body:
# Blockacy of Kain

This mod adds new weapons, blocks and items from the franchise "Legacy of Kain", currently mostly stuff from Soul Reaver. The mod will aim to bring as much of the franchise as possible whilst maintaining a minecraft mod feel including additional non-canon additions for gameplay.


Legacy of Kain is an amazing franchise, based in the land of Nosgoth. In Soul Reaver, Vampires reign supreme with Kain as the figure head of his empire. It has a heavy gothic setting with a deep lore and story, I'd highly recommend playing through the games in the series or at least watching some videos on them.

### Soul Reaver
The mod has the Soul Reaver blade item as its focal point, most features currently are from the "Soul Reaver" games. Currently you can craft, destroy and forge with the elements, these all have some abilities based upon the games. These could be usable within a puzzle map if made.

### Vampires
This feature is very limited right now and has only 1 canon vampire within the mod. More vampire types are to be added to match up with the different clans wherein territory battles between the factions are planned to be a feature. Along with these clans Vampirification and beyond this, Wraithification, both allowing different sets of powers and gameplay experiences. 

### Glyph Magic
A whole new magic system "Glyph Magic" is to be added alongside several items and blocks, some for cosmetic use for those who like to roleplay as well as some for actual use within the world.

_

There is an ingame guide that should explain details about items that have been added and some WIP ideas to come, many of which may not be added till a port to higher Minecraft. Many features have already been planned to really bring the life of Nosgoth into Minecraft.
This is more of a fun passion project so updates are expected to be slow.

Join the discord to stay informed of any future updates or if you have any questions :
https://discord.gg/SeSzabP

 

I do not own Legacy of Kain or any associated IP. This is a fan made project and all rights are owned by their respective rights holders.
